sections.content: Now the white U-shape is pointing right! The red blocks are now on the right side of the white shape. The white shape is above the green frame. I need to move it down so the red blocks align with the green frame. Let me check the positions and move down.

sections.label: TOOL CALL: python
sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
seg = current_frame.segmentation
nodes = seg['nodes']
for n in nodes:
    if n['color'] in ['W', 'R', 'N']:
        b = n['boundary']
        minr = min(p[0] for p in b)
        maxr = max(p[0] for p in b)
        minc = min(p[1] for p in b)
        maxc = max(p[1] for p in b)
        info = "id=%d color=%s b=[%d-%d, %d-%d]" % (n['id'], n['color'], minr, maxr, minc, maxc)
        print(info)
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
